subject: Twilit -> Incandescent (Director): owner-directed session-close at 13:13Z; cure bundle v2 hand-off for successor; files-claim closed
body:
Incandescent (Director) — Twilit owner-directed session-complete at 13:13Z. Handoff for re-routing to successor agent.

**Owner direction (verbatim)**: "close all claims and prepare for handoff, this session is complete and all work must be passed to other agents via the director"

## State at handoff

**Cure bundle v2 in working tree, NOT staged, NOT committed.** Files-claim 96f00b19 just closed. The bundle absorbs all three of Secret's synthesis conditions (your V verdict at 13:11:23Z) and 497/497 tests pass; gates all silent green.

**Latest broadcast**: bundle-ready-v2 at event `e3e52ed5` (13:12Z) — full file delta + gate report.

## Working-tree files (cure scope; for successor agent's claim)

Product:
- `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/cli-comms-inbox.ts`
- `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/cli-comms-watch.ts`
- `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/cli-specs.ts`
- `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-relevant-events.ts`
- `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-use-cases.ts`
- `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.ts`

Tests (2 new + 3 modified):
- `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/comms-watch-loop.unit.test.ts` (new; 11 tests)
- `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.unit.test.ts` (new; 13 tests including malformed-JSON case)
- `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/comms-use-cases.integration.test.ts`
- `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/unified-comms-format.integration.test.ts`
- `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/collaboration-state.integration.test.ts`

Handoff-record auto-fix (Director Verdict 1 KEEP at 12:59:50Z):
- `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/director-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-next.md` (MD032/MD004 mechanical only)

## What needs picking up

1. **Torrid Igniting Bellows / codex / 019e54** — adversarial review trigger remains armed against bundle-ready-v2. Per your 13:11:29Z directive, option (a). Adversarial verdict expected as directed comms event to you. (No new action required from me; Torrid is on it.)
2. **Marshal cycle to Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / 6966d4** — after Torrid's verdict lands, successor routes marshal request to Seaworthy with intent_id + commit subject. Drafted commit subject suggestion: `feat(agent-tools): land FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (heartbeat substrate + step-runner + S7786 cure)`. Atomic-landing split-commit flag belongs in commit message body per Secret's recommendation.
3. **4 deferrable follow-up-tranche slices** Secret named — defer; not absorbed into v2 per your "don't widen scope" directive. Surfaced for future routing.

## Other context the successor needs

- Files-claim 96f00b19 closed without retention; successor opens fresh claim under their own identity covering the same file list.
- Bundle has NOT been staged from my side; successor stages from working tree as marshal coordinates.
- No staged-bundle-fingerprint to inherit.
- Zephyrous's pair-support spec-fidelity verdict (event 13:02:54Z): PASS, no blocking gotchas.

## My closeout actions

- Files-claim 96f00b19 closed at 13:13:46Z.
- Comms monitor bxllbjlcq about to be stopped (next bash call).
- Final team-member closeout broadcast about to fire.

## Identity

Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93. Session 8d8d93 complete; ready for compaction.

— Twilit / 8d8d93
